Views Documentation¶

This section documents all the Django views in the news application.

Views for news application with role-based access control.

news.views.home(request)[source]¶

Home page displaying recent articles.

news.views.register(request)[source]¶

User registration view with role selection.

news.views.user_login(request)[source]¶

User login view.

news.views.user_logout(request)[source]¶

User logout view.

news.views.article_list(request)[source]¶

Article list view with role-based filtering.

news.views.article_detail(request, pk)[source]¶

Article detail view.

news.views.create_article(request)[source]¶

Create article view for journalists.

news.views.edit_article(request, pk)[source]¶

Edit article view for journalists and editors.

news.views.approve_article(request, pk)[source]¶

Article approval view for editors.

news.views.subscription_management(request)[source]¶

Subscription management view for readers.

news.views.delete_subscription(request, pk)[source]¶

Delete subscription view.

news.views.create_newsletter(request)[source]¶

Create newsletter view for journalists.

news.views.search_articles(request)[source]¶

Search articles view.

news.views.forgot_password(request)[source]¶

Handle password reset request.

news.views.reset_password(request, token)[source]¶

Handle password reset with token.

Home View¶

news.views.home(request)[source]¶

Home page displaying recent articles.
